description_long: This is a round, rustic bread roll with a slightly irregular, lumpy shape and a golden-brown crust. The surface is matte and uneven, with subtle variations in color ranging from light tan to deeper brown, suggesting a hand-formed, artisanal quality. The crust appears to be firm but not overly hard, with a natural, unscored finish and no visible flour dusting or seeds. One side of the bread features some handwritten markings, possibly for identification or cataloging. The bread's overall appearance is dense and compact, with no visible openings or slices. Its coloration and texture evoke a traditional, hearty bread roll commonly found in bakeries or street markets.
description: A round, rustic bread roll with a golden-brown, uneven crust and subtle color variations. The surface is matte and lumpy, with no visible slices or decorative scoring.
description_view_0: This view shows the bread's rounded top with a generally smooth, mottled tan and brown surface and no visible markings.
description_view_1: This angle highlights a more irregular, lumpy side of the bread, emphasizing its hand-formed appearance.
description_view_2: This view reveals handwritten markings on the crust, likely for identification, and shows a flatter, slightly lighter surface.
description_view_3: This side displays a mostly uniform, rounded surface with subtle color variations and no visible markings.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is naturally uneven and lumpy, with a matte finish and no visible scoring, flour dusting, or seeds. Its texture is rustic, with subtle color mottling and a hand-formed appearance.
